description: Particle Effects System - Ambient background particles, trade execution bursts, market volatility indicators, evolution event particles, and performance celebration effects

userStories.title: Create ParticleBackground component
userStories.description: As a user, I need an ambient particle background for visual appeal.
acceptanceCriteria: Add floating particles with slow movement
Add mouse interaction (repel particles on hover)
Use theme colors (green particles on dark background)
Enable particle links (lines between nearby particles)
Add pointer-events-none to not block interactions
Add performance optimization (disable on low-end devices)
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented ParticleBackground component with all acceptance criteria met. Created component using tsparticles slim preset for optimal performance. Implemented floating particles with slow movement (0.5 speed), mouse interaction with repulse mode, theme-aware green colors (#10b981 dark, #059669 light), 50 particles count, size range 1-3px, opacity 0.3, particle links at 150px distance with 0.2 opacity, absolute positioning with inset-0, pointer-events-none, and performance optimization for low-end devices. Component is fully typed with TypeScript.

userStories.title: Create trade execution particle burst effect
userStories.description: As a trader, I need visual feedback when trades execute.
acceptanceCriteria: Create particle burst on trade execution event
Size burst proportional to trade volume
Animate burst from trade card position outward
Play sound effect on burst (optional, can be disabled)
Subscribe to trade_update WebSocket events for closes
userStories.notes: Successfully implemented TradeBurst component with all acceptance criteria met. Created canvas-based particle system for optimal performance without external dependencies. Implemented particle burst on trade execution events with color-coding by direction (BUY=#10b981/#059669 green, SELL=#ef4444/#dc2626 red). Size proportional to trade volume using scaling multiplier (0.01 lot=1x, 1.0 lot=2x, 10+ lots=3x). Animated burst from trade card position outward using canvas rendering with requestAnimationFrame. Created 100 particles per burst with speed 3, size range 2-6px, opacity 0.8, fade out over 2 seconds. Supports multiple concurrent bursts (max 5) via Map-based state management. Optional sound effect on burst using Web Audio API with different tones (880Hz BUY, 440Hz SELL). WebSocket subscriptions structured for mt5_order_opened and trade_update events with custom event listener for component integration. Fully typed with TypeScript including TradeEvent interface and useTradeBurst hook for manual triggering.

userStories.title: Create market volatility particle indicators
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see market volatility through particle intensity.
acceptanceCriteria: Create volatility indicator particles for each market
Set particle count based on volatility level (V10=20, V25=40, V50=60, V75=80, V100=100)
Set particle speed based on volatility (V10=1, V25=2, V50=3, V75=4, V100=5)
Update particles in real-time with market data
Add particles to market overview cards
Update particle count and speed on price change
Add visual intensity indicator (more movement = higher volatility)

userStories.title: Create evolution event particle effects
userStories.description: As a user, I need visual feedback during evolution cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Create particle effect on evolution cycle start
Create DNA-like double helix spiral animation
Create particle stream representing features mutating
Create burst effect on cycle completion
Show feature success with particle color (green=success, red=failure)
Add smooth transitions between evolution states

userStories.title: Create performance celebration particle effects
userStories.description: As a trader, I need celebratory effects on achievements.
acceptanceCriteria: Create confetti burst on significant wins (>$100 profit)
Trigger on milestone achievements (100 trades, 90% win rate, etc)
Create multiple particle types (confetti squares, stars, sparks)
Check thresholds and trigger celebration automatically
